title: scirpus maritimus var. compactus
intro: Scirpus maritimus var. compactus, also known as compact sea club-rush, is a variety of the sea club-rush plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the treatment of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, Scirpus maritimus var. compactus is typically used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
